positive: A minimalist, vector-graphic illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene. The composition is symmetrical and centered, dominated by a central group of stylized trees, mushrooms, and floating lanterns. The style should evoke Nordic folklore meets Art Deco, using thick, confident lines and negative space. Color palette: deep emerald greens, mustard yellows, slate blues, and burnt orange, with a limited, high-contrast use of white. The flora should have clean, repeating geometric patterns. High detail, studio lighting, perfect for screen printing on a t-shirt.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, noise, text, blurry, artifacts, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, messy, cluttered
